description: ADAudit Plus is running at http://localhost:8081/ (login: admin/Admin@2024). Your organization has experienced unauthorized privilege escalations where multiple Windows user accounts were added to sensitive security groups without change-management approval. Investigate the group membership change events to identify which user accounts were added to which groups and when. Create three technician accounts for the governance team: 'gov_lead' (Full Name: 'Governance Lead', Email: 'gov.lead@corp.local', Password: 'GovTeam@2025', Role: 'Auditor'), 'risk_analyst' (Full Name: 'Risk Analyst', Email: 'risk.analyst@corp.local', Password: 'RiskTeam@2025', Role: 'Operator'), and 'change_manager' (Full Name: 'Change Manager', Email: 'change.manager@corp.local', Password: 'ChangeTeam@2025', Role: 'Operator'). Schedule a report named 'Group Membership Changes Weekly' to run every week. Document the accounts added to privileged groups, their respective groups, and recommended remediation actions in a governance audit report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\governance_audit.txt.
